scope_boundary: source inventory, appendix ownership, and backlog-shape mechanics only; no external-literature completeness or citation-normalization claim is promoted
transition_reason: The repository has public-safe source records, source notes, split Corben/local and external-source appendices, and a research-backlog schema fixture. The claim remains at argument because external literature normalization, citation verification, and backlog closure are still incomplete.
required_artifacts: citation-normalized external literature records after direct reading
source-note updates for newly used outside literature
closed or advanced research backlog records
accepted evidence transition for any stronger bibliography claim
negative_results: research backlog fixture validates shape only
downgrade_triggers: external source cited without direct reading
private source leakage into public appendix
promotion_burden: Move above argument only after the claim is narrowed to validated source-graph mechanics or after citation-normalized external-literature work is completed and reviewed.
limitations: source inventory presence is not evidence strength
source notes are drafting context until accepted transitions or tests justify movement
reviewer_independence: local maintainer-agent review only; not an independent bibliography audit
non_claims: does not claim complete bibliography coverage
does not claim external literature-backed support
does not promote any chapter claim
